name: agentx-plugins
description: A curated directory of high-quality plugins for Claude Code, developed and maintained by AgentX.

plugins.name: bot-chat
plugins.description: Bind a Claude Code session to an IM chat room (Matrix / WeChat via AgentX bots): push long-task results to the room on turn end, receive room replies into the session.

plugins.name: bot-notify
plugins.description: Push Claude Code notifications (turn results, human-in-the-loop alerts) to a shared IM chat room via an AgentX bot. Outbound-only, zero LLM tokens, no Node.js.

plugins.name: agent-team
plugins.description: A domain-agnostic agent-team scaffold and plugin-spec reference library, built around the Planner → Generator → Evaluator loop. Reusable role agents, a reference workflow, and a runnable minimal example of every plugin primitive (hooks, rules-via-hook, MCP, LSP, output styles, monitors, PATH binaries, userConfig). Local-first; deploys headless to Claude Managed Agents via scripts/cma.

plugins.name: scratch
plugins.description: Start-from-scratch session utilities: /scratch:fresh rescans ~/.claude (skills, plugins, agents, commands, MCP) so a new session knows everything available and clones the target project into ./projects/<name>; /scratch:takeover absorbs another directory's session history, moves its files here, and continues the work.

plugins.name: dev-studio
plugins.description: A cloud-native software delivery agent team: seven roles across a Build → Ship → Accept → Promote lifecycle, building proto-first ConnectRPC + SolidJS services from the team scaffold, shipping to Kubernetes, accepting black-box via live URLs, and promoting with cited market material. Follows the agent-team-scaffold reference layout.
